name: BMW G20/G21/G28 3 Series plug-in hybrid (2.0L 4-cyl petrol + electric)

serviceNotes.engine oil: G20 330e B48 PHEV: CBS MFR 30,000 km / 12 months typical for plug-in (follow service display and PHEV supplement).
serviceNotes.micro filter: Interior filter at every engine oil change per garage.wiki F30 LCI 2020 (modular CBS).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Every 2 years after first change; garage.wiki F30 LCI lists first change at 3 years. Regen changes pad wear, not fluid hygroscopy.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km) per garage.wiki F30 LCI 2020.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km: spark plugs with each second engine oil change (garage.wiki F30 LCI 2020).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Regen extends pad life; still inspect per CBS (~50,000 km planning).
serviceNotes.vehicle check: Includes hybrid-specific checks; use a workshop qualified for high-voltage systems.
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: BMW PHEV models use a cooled high-voltage battery/e-drive circuit; many EU schedules specify inspection/replacement around 120,000 km—confirm in the HV supplement.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Engine cooling circuit preventive ~120,000 km (separate from HV coolant in some vehicles).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: DI petrol engine may still need intake cleaning at high combustion mileage (~120,000 km).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals); PHEV 12-month cap per BMW PHEV supplement. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2020/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2020/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2020/service-intervals.html — first change 3 years then every 2 years; BMW owner's manual G20 330e
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2020/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2020/service-intervals.html — second engine oil change
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 50,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 60,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
serviceSources.high-voltage battery coolant: BMW PHEV high-voltage cooling system — typical 120,000 km; confirm in HV supplement for model year
